compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava

comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body:
Verification results (2026-07-10 ~04:45–05:05 UTC, supervised via SSM):
- RED reproduced with timer disarmed: docker compose up -d --dry-run review-bot → 'external volume gerrit_reviewbot_tickets not found'.
- Fix applied: mkdir /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets + docker volume create (opts identical to sibling gerrit_reviewbot); dry-run → GREEN (clean recreate plan).
- Supervised autodeploy run: 'review-bot redeployed + healthy', deploy complete at d1e4cd5c; Gerrit container untouched; root disk 20% used after prune.
- Functional probe: /rerun change 461 → LLM-Review+1 [PASS] from the new bot (real review, not coverage-gap).
- Timer re-armed (active). Stale-veto sweep found changes 452 + 459 still carrying coverage-gap -1; both rerun (202 accepted), votes pending.
- Discovered work filed + linked discovered_from: e991 (compose-up.sh fix), b005 (CI drift gate), e2c5 (failure-path prune), ac14 (alarm cadence + disk alarm), e7f4 (snapshot janitor wiring), f600 (PAT/SSM activation + .env delivery gap), e983 (config_manual pending-apply ledger + d1e4cd5c manual apply).

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Land commit 10837ca88 (adds external volume gerrit_reviewbot_tickets to infra/compose/docker-compose.yml) WITHOUT updating the provisioning loops in infra/scripts/compose-up.sh.
2. Every rebar-autodeploy tick that sees a new main SHA rebuilds the review-bot image, then `docker compose up -d review-bot` aborts: external volume "gerrit_reviewbot_tickets" not found. Backoff resets on each new main SHA, so a busy push day compresses many multi-GB docker builds into a tight window.
3. Around 2026-07-10 03:15–03:52 UTC the 30G root disk transiently filled (pip Errno 28 in the autodeploy builds, journal); concurrent review clones then failed (VOTER_ERROR "No space left on device"), fail-closing changes 452/461/462 with [LLM-Review: BLOCK — coverage-gap (review-error)].

**Expected:** autodeploy converges after every main advance; reviews never veto for infra reasons.
**Actual:** deploys failed on every attempt for ~41h (fail #21 by Jul 10 00:00); transient ENOSPC fail-closed live reviews.

## Resolution (applied on-box 2026-07-10 ~04:45 UTC, supervised)
- Pruned builder/image caches (~3.5G), verified RED via `docker compose up -d --dry-run review-bot` (reproduced the volume error).
- Created the missing bind volume exactly matching sibling spec: `docker volume create --driver local --opt type=none --opt o=bind --opt device=/var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets gerrit_reviewbot_tickets` (+ mkdir of host dir); dry-run then GREEN.
- One supervised autodeploy run: "review-bot redeployed + healthy", deployed-sha now d1e4cd5c; Gerrit container untouched; disk 20% used.
- The repo-side fix for infra/scripts/compose-up.sh (and hardening) is child/discovered work.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Autodeploy converges (deploy complete) after volume creation; no bot-build-failed since.
- [ ] Review-bot posts a real (non-coverage-gap) LLM-Review vote post-deploy (functional probe on change 461).
- [ ] Stale coverage-gap veto on change 452 cleared via /rerun.
- [ ] Discovered follow-up defects filed and linked discovered_from this ticket.
compiled_state.title: incident: review-bot fail-closed LLM-Review vetoes — root disk exhaustion from a 41h autodeploy failure loop (missing gerrit_reviewbot_tickets volume)
